title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering separates the AI coding agent into model and harness components, with the harness consisting of rules, skills, hooks, and subagents at the AI layer. The key leverage comes from orchestrating multiple focused agent sessions into workflows to reliably handle larger tasks and scale coding agents.
